description: Candy colours on Linos Perros wallets, crafted for style mavens. Sleek and slim, this cotton candy pink coloured piece is a love-forever classic. Buy wallets in two or more shades to give you colour blocking options this summer!Length: 20 cmWidth: 10 cmDepth: 0.5 cmButton clasp; two fold walletSix card holders and one pocket on each sideA zippered pocket at the spine of the walletLeather upper with embossed letters of the brandCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
